creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
@tanchadubai instantly captured my dim sum-loving heart! 💗

This upscale Chinese restaurant inside JW Marriott Marquis in Business Bay just opened last year, but it is already considered as one the best dim sum spots in Dubai! 

Here are the reasons to save Tan Cha on your dining out list:
🍸 Cool atmosphere with intimate dining areas
🥢 Personalized chopsticks which made the meal extra memorable! 
🥟 Unique selection of Dim Sum and drinks. Must try are Bumblebee Wagyu Beef Buns and Song Lu Cheong Fun!
🍴 Attentive and cheery service. (Thanks Ben for taking care of us throughout our meal.)
⭐️ It’s a Michelin Guide Dubai 2022- selected restaurant! 

* Approximate spend for two: 400 AED
* Business lunch menu: AED 120 per person – 2 Courses + Tea / AED 170 per person – 3 courses + Tea

Who will you bring here? Tag your date!
